Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cladia]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Cladia's Overlord revelation was similar to Eithan's.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Cladia Arelius is the Sage of a Thousand Eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Cladia Arelius has blonde hair streaked with gray and wears dark blue robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Cladia Arelius uses light madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Cladia Arelius appears at Mercy's side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Cladia is an Archlady and a member of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Cladia Arelius was seen juggling a gatestone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Cladia Arelius is present and observing the others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Cladia told the group to wait until the transfer stabilizes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Cladia wears elegant sacred artist's robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Cladia Arelius provided a blessing that allows Mercy to see the Weeping Dragon more clearly.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
